channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cerebras CEO says AI chip demand is real as shares double in IPO debut
item.description: The offering is one of the largest U.S. tech IPOs in years and tests the market for upcoming AI listings.

item.title: Nonprofit CEOs say Trump's economy drives surging demand and strain
item.description: A new report finds nonprofits facing higher need, tighter funding, staff cuts, and worsening burnout.

item.title: Knight Rider replica car gets $50 speeding ticket in New York from Chicago museum
item.description: The museum's marketing director expressed curiosity about the driver of the replica car.

item.title: Meta's $10 billion Louisiana data center receives $3.3 billion in tax breaks, exceeding seven years of state police funding
item.description: States are providing over $5.6 billion annually to data center developers, a conservative estimate.
